Question: how many games did the San Francisco Giants play the Los Angeles Dodgers in 2025

Actual SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS game_count FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE ((t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND t_away.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers') OR (t_home.name = 'Los Angeles Dodgers' AND t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants')) AND YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final';

Question: game_pk, winner or loser, game date for all double headers in the National League in 2025
Expected SQL: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team_name, t_away.name AS away_team_name, g.teams__home__score, g.teams__away__score, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS winner, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS loser, g.game_date, g.double_header FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.double_header = 'Y' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.league__name = 'National League' OR t_away.league__name = 'National League') ORDER BY g.game_date, g.game_pk;
Actual SQL: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team_name, t_away.name AS away_team_name, g.teams__home__score, g.teams__away__score, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS winner, CASE WHEN g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN t_home.name WHEN g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN t_away.name ELSE 'Tie' END AS loser, g.game_date, g.double_header FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.double_header = 'Y' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.league__name = 'National League' OR t_away.league__name = 'National League') ORDER BY g.game_date, g.game_pk;

Question: game_pk, opponent, winner or loser, score and game date how many regular season games did the San Francisco Giants play National League West opponents in 2025 and what were the results
Expected SQL: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team, t_away.name AS away_team, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' THEN 'Home' ELSE 'Away' END AS giants_home_or_away, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN 'Loser' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN 'Loser' ELSE 'Tie' END AS giants_result, g.teams__home__score AS home_score, g.teams__away__score AS away_score, g.game_date FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' OR t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants') AND t_home.division__name = 'National League West' AND t_away.division__name = 'National League West' ORDER BY g.game_date;
Actual SQL: SELECT TOP (100) g.game_pk, t_home.name AS home_team, t_away.name AS away_team, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' THEN 'Home' ELSE 'Away' END AS giants_home_or_away, CASE WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score > g.teams__away__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__home__score < g.teams__away__score THEN 'Loser' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score > g.teams__home__score THEN 'Winner' WHEN t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants' AND g.teams__away__score < g.teams__home__score THEN 'Loser' ELSE 'Tie' END AS giants_result, g.teams__home__score AS home_score, g.teams__away__score AS away_score, g.game_date FROM dw.games g JOIN dw.teams t_home ON g.teams__home__team__id = t_home.id JOIN dw.teams t_away ON g.teams__away__team__id = t_away.id WHERE YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 AND g.series_description = 'Regular Season' AND g.status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND (t_home.name = 'San Francisco Giants' OR t_away.name = 'San Francisco Giants') AND t_home.division__name = 'National League West' AND t_away.division__name = 'National League West' ORDER BY g.game_date;

Question: player, position, signing bonus for the TOP 3 signing bonus for each round in 2025 draft
Expected SQL: SELECT d.pick_round AS round, d.person__full_name, d.person__primary_position__name, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) AS signing_bonus FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pick_round ORDER BY CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF(signing_bonus, ''), '0') AS decimal(18,2)) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.draft WHERE year = 2025 AND signing_bonus IS NOT NULL AND signing_bonus <> '') d WHERE d.rn <= 3 ORDER BY d.pick_round, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT d.pick_round AS round, d.person__full_name, d.person__primary_position__name, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) AS signing_bonus FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pick_round ORDER BY CAST(ISNULL(NULLIF(signing_bonus, ''), '0') AS decimal(18,2)) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.draft WHERE year = 2025 AND signing_bonus IS NOT NULL AND signing_bonus <> '') d WHERE d.rn <= 3 ORDER BY d.pick_round, CAST(d.signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)) DESC;

Question: year, round, position, pick count for each draft round in 2020-2025
Expected SQL: SELECT d.year, d.pick_round AS round,CASE d.person__primary_position__name WHEN 'Outfield' THEN 'Outfielder' ELSE d.person__primary_position__name END AS position,COUNT(*) AS pick_count FROM dw.draft d WHERE d.year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 GROUP BY d.year, d.pick_round,d.person__primary_position__name ORDER BY d.year, d.pick_round, pick_count DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT d.year, d.pick_round AS round,CASE d.person__primary_position__name WHEN 'Outfield' THEN 'Outfielder' ELSE d.person__primary_position__name END AS position,COUNT(*) AS pick_count FROM dw.draft d WHERE d.year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2025 GROUP BY d.year, d.pick_round,d.person__primary_position__name ORDER BY d.year, d.pick_round, pick_count DESC;

Question: pitcher, pitcher hand, batter side, pitch type, for strikeout pitches total strikeouts called or swinging and total strikeouts over 20
Expected SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type, total_strikeouts, called_k, swinging_k FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_strikeouts, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, AVG(p.start_speed) AS avg_velo, AVG(p.spin_rate) AS avg_spin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.strikes = 2 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;
Actual SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type, total_strikeouts, called_k, swinging_k FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_strikeouts, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_called_strike = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS called_k, SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_whiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS swinging_k, AVG(p.start_speed) AS avg_velo, AVG(p.spin_rate) AS avg_spin, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.strikes = 2 AND (p.is_called_strike = 1 OR p.is_whiff = 1) AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

Question: pitcher name, season, pitch type, total pitch, usage, average velocity, average spin rate, whiff rate, in play rate and strike rate for Top 20 pitchers based on strike rate
Expected SQL: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2025) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY strike_rate DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2025) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY strike_rate DESC;

Question: win loss record for each team in 2025 regular season
Expected SQL: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2025' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

Actual SQL: SELECT a.season, a.award_name, a.player_name, t.name AS team_name, a.position_name FROM dw.award_recipients a LEFT JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = a.team_id WHERE a.award_name IN ('AL Cy Young', 'NL Cy Young') AND a.season BETWEEN '2015' AND '2025' ORDER BY a.season DESC, a.award_name;

Question: players who have won awards with multiple different teams across their career
Expected SQL: SELECT pt.player_name,COUNT(DISTINCT pt.team_id) AS teams_count,COUNT(a.player_name) AS total_awards,STRING_AGG(pt.name, ', ') AS teams FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.player_name,a.team_id,t.name FROM dw.award_recipients a JOIN dw.teams t  ON t.id = a.team_id) pt JOIN dw.award_recipients a ON a.player_name = pt.player_name GROUP BY pt.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pt.team_id) > 1 ORDER BY teams_count DESC, total_awards DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT pt.player_name,COUNT(DISTINCT pt.team_id) AS teams_count,COUNT(a.player_name) AS total_awards,STRING_AGG(pt.name, ', ') AS teams FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.player_name,a.team_id,t.name FROM dw.award_recipients a JOIN dw.teams t  ON t.id = a.team_id) pt JOIN dw.award_recipients a ON a.player_name = pt.player_name GROUP BY pt.player_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pt.team_id) > 1 ORDER BY teams_count DESC, total_awards DESC;

Question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for most used pitches on three ball counts in 2025
Expected SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;
Actual SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

Question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for pitches thrown with two strikes two balls in 2025
Expected SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 2 AND p.strikes = 2 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;
Actual SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 2 AND p.strikes = 2 AND p.season = 2025 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;

Question: win loss record for each team in 2023 regular season
Expected SQL: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT team, SUM(wins) AS wins, SUM(losses) AS losses, CAST(SUM(wins) AS float) / NULLIF(SUM(wins) + SUM(losses), 0) AS win_pct FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__home__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS wins, CASE WHEN teams__away__is_winner = 0 AND is_tie = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS losses FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final') r GROUP BY team ORDER BY win_pct DESC;

Question: home wins and away wins for each team in 2023 regular season
Expected SQL: SELECT team, SUM(home_win) AS home_wins, SUM(away_win) AS away_wins FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, 1 AS home_win, 0 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, 0 AS home_win, 1 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__away__is_winner = 1) w GROUP BY team ORDER BY home_wins DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT team, SUM(home_win) AS home_wins, SUM(away_win) AS away_wins FROM (SELECT teams__home__team__name AS team, 1 AS home_win, 0 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__home__is_winner = 1 UNION ALL SELECT teams__away__team__name AS team, 0 AS home_win, 1 AS away_win FROM dw.games WHERE season = '2023' AND series_description = 'Regular Season' AND status__detailed_state = 'Final' AND teams__away__is_winner = 1) w GROUP BY team ORDER BY home_wins DESC;

Question: average exit velocity and barrel rate by season 2017 to 2025
Expected SQL: SELECT h.season, COUNT(*) AS hitter_count, AVG(h.avg_exit_velocity) AS avg_exit_velo, AVG(h.barrel_rate) AS avg_barrel_rate, AVG(h.hard_hit_rate) AS avg_hard_hit_rate FROM dw.hitter_season_features h WHERE h.season BETWEEN 2017 AND 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 GROUP BY h.season ORDER BY h.season;
Actual SQL: SELECT h.season, COUNT(*) AS hitter_count, AVG(h.avg_exit_velocity) AS avg_exit_velo, AVG(h.barrel_rate) AS avg_barrel_rate, AVG(h.hard_hit_rate) AS avg_hard_hit_rate FROM dw.hitter_season_features h WHERE h.season BETWEEN 2017 AND 2025 AND h.plate_appearances >= 100 GROUP BY h.season ORDER BY h.season;

Question: pitcher name,season,pitch type,whiff rate,strike rate for top 20 pitchers based on whiff rate in 2024
Expected SQL: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2024) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY whiff_rate DESC;
Actual SQL: SELECT TOP (20) full_name, season, pitch_description, total_pitches, usage_pct, avg_velocity, avg_spin_rate, whiff_rate, in_play_rate, strike_rate FROM (SELECT p.full_name, f.season, t.pitch_description, f.total_pitches, f.usage_pct, f.avg_velocity, f.avg_spin_rate, f.whiff_rate, f.in_play_rate, f.strike_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.pitcher_id, f.season ORDER BY f.total_pitches DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitcher_pitch_type_features f JOIN dw.pitch_type t ON t.pitch_type = f.pitch_type LEFT JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = f.pitcher_id WHERE f.pitch_type IS NOT NULL AND p.full_name IS NOT NULL AND f.total_pitches > 200 AND f.season = 2024) ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY whiff_rate DESC;

Question: pitcher batter side and pitch type for most used pitches on three ball counts in 2023
Expected SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2023 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;
Actual SQL: SELECT pitcher_name, pitcher_hand, batter_side, pitch_type FROM (SELECT p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type, COUNT(*) AS total_pitches, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.pitcher_name, p.batter_side ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM dw.pitch_core p WHERE p.balls = 3 AND p.season = 2023 GROUP BY p.pitcher_name, p.pitcher_hand, p.batter_side, p.pitch_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 20) ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY pitcher_name, batter_side;
